sys_script_include.name: UnifiedMigrationEngine

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_2d7bd1f1ebeb7250084cfd50dad0cdde
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_sysus_data_mig_0.UnifiedMigrationEngine</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>UnifiedMigrationEngine</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var UnifiedMigrationEngine = Class.create();
UnifiedMigrationEngine.prototype = {

    initialize: function() {

        this._migratedRecords = {};
        this._cacheRefFields = {};
        this._recursionDepth = 0;
        this.MAX_RECURSION = 5;

        this.SOURCE_URL = '';
        this.SOURCE_USER = '';
        this.SOURCE_PSWD = '';

        this.MIGRATE_ALL_REFS = true;
    },

    /* =====================================================
       MAIN ENTRY
    ===================================================== */

    migrateRecord: function(source_url, username, password, table, sysId) {

        this.SOURCE_URL = source_url;
        this.SOURCE_USER = username;
        this.SOURCE_PSWD = password;

        gs.info(']]>🚀<![CDATA[ START MIGRATION: ' + table + '/' + sysId);

        var targetId = this.migrateWithDependencies(table, sysId);

        if (targetId) {
            this.migrateRelatedLists(table, sysId, targetId);
            this.validateMigration(table, targetId);
        }

        return targetId;
    },

    /* =====================================================
       DEPENDENCY MIGRATION (REFERENCE FIELDS)
    ===================================================== */

    migrateWithDependencies: function(table, sourceSysId) {

        var cacheKey = table + "_" + sourceSysId;

        if (this._migratedRecords[cacheKey])
            return this._migratedRecords[cacheKey];

        this._recursionDepth++;

        if (this._recursionDepth > this.MAX_RECURSION) {
            gs.warn("⚠️ Recursion limit reached");
            this._recursionDepth--;
            return '';
        }

        try {

            var record = this.fetchSourceRecord(table, sourceSysId);
            if (!record) return '';

            var refFields = this._getCachedRefFields(table);

            for (var i = 0; i < refFields.length; i++) {

                var rf = refFields[i];
                var srcRef = this.normalizeRef(record[rf.field]);

                if (!srcRef) continue;

                var targetRef = this.migrateWithDependencies(rf.refTable, srcRef);

                if (targetRef)
                    record[rf.field] = targetRef;
            }

            var targetId = this.safeUpsert(record, table, record.sys_id);

            this._migratedRecords[cacheKey] = targetId;

            return targetId;

        } catch (e) {

            gs.error("Migration error: " + e);

        } finally {

            this._recursionDepth--;

        }

        return '';
    },

    /* =====================================================
       RELATED LIST MIGRATION
    ===================================================== */

    migrateRelatedLists: function(parentTable, sourceParentId, targetParentId) {

        gs.info(']]>📦<![CDATA[ Discovering related lists for ' + parentTable);

        var relatedLists = this.discoverRelatedLists(parentTable);

        for (var i = 0; i < relatedLists.length; i++) {

            var rl = relatedLists[i];

            var children = this.fetchChildren(
                rl.childTable,
                rl.refField,
                parentTable,
                sourceParentId
            );

            if (!children.length)
                continue;

            gs.info("]]>📂<![CDATA[ Migrating " + children.length + " records from " + rl.childTable);

            for (var c = 0; c < children.length; c++) {

                var child = children[c];

                child[rl.refField] = targetParentId;

                this.safeUpsert(child, rl.childTable, child.sys_id);
            }
        }
    },

    /* =====================================================
       DISCOVER RELATED LISTS (DYNAMIC)
    ===================================================== */

    discoverRelatedLists: function(parentTable) {

        var baseUrl = this.SOURCE_URL.replace(/\/+$/, '');

        var api = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2();

        var query = "internal_type=reference&reference=" + parentTable;

        api.setEndpoint(baseUrl +
            "/api/now/table/sys_dictionary?sysparm_query=" +
            encodeURIComponent(query) +
            "&sysparm_fields=name,element");

        api.setHttpMethod("GET");
        api.setBasicAuth(this.SOURCE_USER, this.SOURCE_PSWD);

        var response = api.execute();

        if (response.getStatusCode() !== 200)
            return [];

        var data = JSON.parse(response.getBody());

        var rel = [];

        for (var i = 0; i < data.result.length; i++) {

            rel.push({
                childTable: data.result[i].name,
                refField: data.result[i].element
            });

        }

        rel.push({ childTable: "sys_attachment", refField: "table_sys_id" });
        rel.push({ childTable: "sys_journal_field", refField: "element_id" });

        return rel;
    },

    /* =====================================================
       FETCH SOURCE RECORD
    ===================================================== */

    fetchSourceRecord: function(table, sysId) {

        var api = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2();
        var baseUrl = this.SOURCE_URL.replace(/\/+$/, '');

        api.setEndpoint(baseUrl + "/api/now/table/" + table + "/" + sysId);

        api.setHttpMethod("GET");
        api.setBasicAuth(this.SOURCE_USER, this.SOURCE_PSWD);

        var response = api.execute();

        if (response.getStatusCode() !== 200) {
            gs.error("Fetch failed");
            return null;
        }

        var data = JSON.parse(response.getBody());

        return data.result || null;
    },

    /* =====================================================
       FETCH CHILD RECORDS
    ===================================================== */

    fetchChildren: function(childTable, refField, parentTable, parentSysId) {

        var api = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2();

        var baseUrl = this.SOURCE_URL.replace(/\/+$/, '');

        var query;

        if (childTable == "sys_attachment")
            query = "table_sys_id=" + parentSysId + "&table_name=" + parentTable;

        else if (childTable == "sys_journal_field")
            query = "element_id=" + parentSysId + "&name=" + parentTable;

        else
            query = refField + "=" + parentSysId;

        api.setEndpoint(baseUrl +
            "/api/now/table/" + childTable +
            "?sysparm_query=" + encodeURIComponent(query) +
            "&sysparm_limit=10000");

        api.setHttpMethod("GET");
        api.setBasicAuth(this.SOURCE_USER, this.SOURCE_PSWD);

        var response = api.execute();

        if (response.getStatusCode() !== 200)
            return [];

        var data = JSON.parse(response.getBody());

        return data.result || [];
    },

    /* =====================================================
       SAFE UPSERT (INSERT / UPDATE)
    ===================================================== */

    safeUpsert: function(fieldMap, table, sysId) {

        var gr = new GlideRecord(table);

        gr.setWorkflow(false);
        gr.setUseEngines(false);
        gr.autoSysFields(false);

        var exists = sysId && gr.get(sysId);

        if (!exists) {

            gr.initialize();

            if (sysId)
                gr.setNewGuidValue(sysId);
        }

        for (var f in fieldMap) {

            if (!gr.isValidField(f))
                continue;

            var v = fieldMap[f];

            if (v && typeof v === "object" && v.value)
                v = v.value;

            if (Array.isArray(v))
                continue;

            try {
                gr.setValue(f, v);
            } catch (e) {}
        }

        return exists ? gr.update() : gr.insert();
    },

    /* =====================================================
       REFERENCE FIELD DISCOVERY
    ===================================================== */

    getReferenceFields: function(table) {

        var api = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2();

        var baseUrl = this.SOURCE_URL.replace(/\/+$/, '');

        api.setEndpoint(baseUrl +
            "/api/now/table/sys_dictionary?sysparm_query=name=" +
            table +
            "&internal_type=reference");

        api.setHttpMethod("GET");
        api.setBasicAuth(this.SOURCE_USER, this.SOURCE_PSWD);

        var response = api.execute();

        if (response.getStatusCode() !== 200)
            return [];

        var data = JSON.parse(response.getBody());

        var refs = [];

        for (var i = 0; i < data.result.length; i++) {

            refs.push({
                field: data.result[i].element,
                refTable: data.result[i].reference
            });

        }

        return refs;
    },

    _getCachedRefFields: function(table) {

        if (!this._cacheRefFields[table])
            this._cacheRefFields[table] = this.getReferenceFields(table);

        return this._cacheRefFields[table];
    },

    normalizeRef: function(v) {

        if (v && typeof v === "object" && v.value)
            return String(v.value);

        return String(v || "");
    },

    /* =====================================================
       BATCH MIGRATION
    ===================================================== */

    batchMigration: function(source_url, username, password, table, sysIdArray) {

        var results = {};

        for (var i = 0; i < sysIdArray.length; i++) {

            var src = sysIdArray[i];

            try {

                var id = this.migrateRecord(
                    source_url,
                    username,
                    password,
                    table,
                    src
                );

                results[src] = id;

            } catch (e) {

                results[src] = "FAILED";
            }
        }

        return results;
    },

    validateMigration: function(table, sysId) {

        var gr = new GlideRecord(table);

        if (gr.get(sysId))
            gs.info("✅ Migration verified: " + table);
    },

    type: 'UnifiedMigrationEngine'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>faizan.latief</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-11 10:21:53</sys_created_on><sys_id>2d7bd1f1ebeb7250084cfd50dad0cdde</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>UnifiedMigrationEngine</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Data Migration" source="x_sysus_data_mig_0">9977a0f8eb03f610084cfd50dad0cd43</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Data Migration">9977a0f8eb03f610084cfd50dad0cd43</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_2d7bd1f1ebeb7250084cfd50dad0cdde</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>faizan.latief</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-11 10:34:41</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
